data.title: Sanofi provides update on tolebrutinib submission for non-relapsing secondary progressive MS treatment.
data.description: Sanofi recently released an update regarding the regulatory submission for tolebrutinib in non-relapsing secondary progressive multiple sclerosis. This promising development aims to address the unmet medical needs in patients with this condition. The drug is undergoing evaluations for its safety and efficacy, showcasing positive results. Sanofi's efforts highlight their commitment to advancing treatments for neurological disorders. This advancement represents a significant step forward in the medical field, offering hope to numerous individuals affected by this condition.
Elis declares a reduced share capital by canceling treasury shares.

data.title: FLSmidth reports buy-back transactions, enhancing shareholder value with strategic investments.
data.description: The new data indicates that the economy grew at a rate of 5.4% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. This growth was primarily driven by a 7% increase in consumer spending, while business investments saw a 3.2% decline. Unemployment also dropped to 4.1%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The stock market responded positively to these figures, with the Dow Jones index reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts are optimistic about the future economic outlook based on these strong performance indicators.

data.title: XRP price to hit $2.22 in 7 days, $26.97 by 2030, facing resistance at $2.22 now with potential 20% upside from $1.85.
data.description: XRP is currently encountering resistance at $2.22, with technical analysis pointing towards a potential 20% increase from its current price of $1.85. Long-term projections aim for a value of $26.97 by the year 2030.

data.description: Forecasting suggests that if the crucial resistance at $928 is surpassed, the price of BNB could see a potential rebound to the range of $885-$920 in the next month. This remains plausible despite the presence of bearish technical signals at the moment.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $3,400 recovery despite $2,924 weakness. Q1 2025 forecast indicates key resistance at $3,319.
data.description: Despite the current bearish momentum bringing the price of Ethereum (ETH) to $2,924, price prediction models anticipate a rise to $3,400 by January. The Ethereum forecast indicates conflicting signals, with a critical resistance level identified at $3,319. These numbers suggest a potential upward trend in the near future for ETH.

data.title: Bitcoin could reach $94,500 in 7-10 days as indicators show bullish momentum, despite consolidating below $88k.
data.description: Analysts predict that Bitcoin could see a significant increase in value, potentially reaching $94,500 in the next 7-10 days. This projection is supported by the bullish divergence seen in the MACD histogram, despite the current trading below the $88,000 resistance level. This development indicates a possible rally in the cryptocurrency market, with a notable price increase on the horizon.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile successfully launched BlueBird 6, the largest commercial communications array in LEO, from India.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) revealed the successful launch of BlueBird 6, a key component of its space-based cellular broadband network. The mission took place on December 23 at 10:25 p.m. EST from the Satish Dhawan Space Centre in Sriharikota, India. BlueBird 6 is now the largest of its kind in the company's network, aimed to provide direct mobile access for both everyday users and government applications.

data.title: Mitsubishi Power & Mitsubishi Electric complete testing of next-gen gas turbine control system for thermal power plants.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Power, a division of Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Ltd. (MHI), and Mitsubishi Electric Corporation have successfully conducted functional testing for their new gas turbine control system designed for thermal power plants. The collaborative system incorporates advanced control technology from Mitsubishi Power and high-speed data processing technology from Mitsubishi Electric. This integration aims to enhance the performance of large gas turbines utilized in thermal power plants.

data.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent praises Trump's economic policies, cites private economy growing at 4.7% rate, contrasts with Biden.
data.description: According to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the U.S. private economy is experiencing significant acceleration under President Donald Trump. Bessent highlighted a notable expansion in real economic output excluding government activity. In a post, Bessent mentioned that the private economy is thriving under Trump, with GDP growth excluding government activity surging at a rate of 4.7% annually over the past two quarters. He contrasted this with the previous administration under Biden, where growth was driven by government spending leading to historic inflation and lowered living standards. Data indicated a stark difference in economic performance.

data.title: Faraday Future delivers FX Super One to RAK Digital Assets Oasis and FF 91 2.0 to Hebron Sher. FF Middle East signs MOU with RAK Digital for AI, Web3.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. announced that their subsidiary, Faraday Future Middle East FZ-LLC, has signed an MOU with RAK Digital Assets Oasis in United Arab Emirates. The California-based company will collaborate with RAK Innovation City on artificial intelligence, Web3, and digital economy, as well as embodied intelligence. This partnership explores innovative technologies and strategies for future development.

data.title: S&P 500 hits record close with improved investor sentiment, Fear Index remains in 'Greed' zone. GDP grew at 4.3%. Markets price in 15% chance of Fed rate cut. [Char: 199]
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index signaled a positive shift in market sentiment, remaining in the "Greed" zone on Tuesday. U.S. stocks saw gains, with the S&P 500 hitting a record high during trading, driven by a surge in artificial intelligence stocks. The New York Stock Exchange announced an early closure at 1 p.m. ET on Wednesday for Christmas Eve and will be closed on Thursday for Christmas Day. In the third quarter, the gross domestic product expanded by 4.3% annually, surpassing expectations around 3.3% and showing the fastest growth rate in two years. Traders adjusted their expectations for Federal Reserve easing due to this strong performance, with markets indicating a 15% likelihood of a 25-basis-point cut in the near future. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Glassnode reports sustained outflows in Bitcoin and Ether ETFs since November, indicating institutional disengagement.
data.description: According to Glassnode, institutions have been withdrawing their investments from Bitcoin and Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs) consistently since the beginning of November. This ongoing trend of outflows from these ETFs is seen as a sign of institutional disinterest in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: UiPath joins S&P Midcap 400, shares rise in trading on Tuesday. Stock futures slightly lower on Wednesday.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are showing a slight decrease. Investors might pay attention to UiPath Inc. (NYSE: PATH) as its shares rose in extended trading following the news that it will be included in the S&P Midcap 400. After markets closed on Tuesday, S&P Dow Jones Indices stated that UiPath will take the place of Synovus Financial Corp. (NYSE: SNV) in the S&P MidCap 400. For further details on this development, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
